title: clematis viorna var. flaccida
intro: Clematis viorna var. flaccida is a flowering plant species, also known as Virgin's Bower, which belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Clematis viorna var. flaccida include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats and ease congestion.
